description: The Inagawa-kai is the third largest yakuza group in Japan, based in the Kantō region. Founded in 1949 by Kakuji Inagawa in Atami, Shizuoka, it initially focused on illegal gambling and later expanded into drug trafficking, extortion, and prostitution. It was one of the first yakuza organizations to operate overseas and has an estimated 1,600 members.
